baseline_protocol.source: Hunter Williams + Jay Campbell Cheat Sheet 2023

reset_biology_synthesis.recommendation: Reset Biology asks the practitioner to consider Hunter Williams's newer library-video regimen: Hunter Williams (2026-03-29), "What I would do with MOTC is I will do five milligrams subcutaneously." [how-to-supercharge-your-mitochondria-with-these-powerful-peptides--22679a4f | 04:22 | https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-supercharge-your-mitochondria-with-these-powerful-peptides--22679a4f/] Hunter Williams (2026-03-29), "Then you can combine them all into the same syringe. or excuse me, all into the same vial and then just do 30 units of that. That will be one milligram of 5-amino, one milligrams of Matzi, and 10 milligrams NAD plus." [struggling-with-fatigue-my-go-to-peptide-stack-for-instant-energy--d63e71d7 | 07:05 | https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/struggling-with-fatigue-my-go-to-peptide-stack-for-instant-energy--d63e71d7/] Hunter Williams (2026-03-29), "You could also do it intramuscularly for a little bit more of a performance enhancement benefit, but you could do a sub-cutaniously two to three times per week. I'll do that for four to eight weeks, then reevaluate." [how-to-supercharge-your-mitochondria-with-these-powerful-peptides--22679a4f | 04:53 | https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-supercharge-your-mitochondria-with-these-powerful-peptides--22679a4f/]
reset_biology_synthesis.caveats:
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "Now you got to be careful with the dosage because if do too high can basically kind of make your heart In some cases, it can kind of make your heart rate go up." [struggling-with-fatigue-my-go-to-peptide-stack-for-instant-energy--d63e71d7 | 05:32 | https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/struggling-with-fatigue-my-go-to-peptide-stack-for-instant-energy--d63e71d7/]
- Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "So be very careful of using those together. But for me, it was a Good indicator that i was becoming more insulin sensitive because the same two units of insulin that was using post-workout actually made me go hy po even with carbs when it never had before. so I knew that Motsy was doing something. Don't try that at home." [mots-c-vs-ss-31-which-mitochondria-peptide-is-right-for-you--09424002 | 13:11 | https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/mots-c-vs-ss-31-which-mitochondria-peptide-is-right-for-you--09424002/]
- Existing Hunter Williams + Jay Campbell Cheat Sheet baseline (2023; no timestamped video attached to the card): "2 mg" / "Every 3rd day" / "2 weeks". Newer Hunter library-video evidence (2026-03-29) is the operative timestamped recommendation: "five milligrams subcutaneously" and "two to three times per week. I'll do that for four to eight weeks, then reevaluate." [how-to-supercharge-your-mitochondria-with-these-powerful-peptides--22679a4f | 04:22-04:53 | https://library.hunterwilliamshealth.com/p/how-to-supercharge-your-mitochondria-with-these-powerful-peptides--22679a4f/]

chronic.verbatim_citation: Hunter Williams (2026-03-29): "What I would do with MOTC is I will do five milligrams subcutaneously. You could also do it intramuscularly for a little bit more of a performance enhancement benefit, but you could do a sub-cutaniously two to three times per week. I'll do that for four to eight weeks, then reevaluate."
